condition_specific: bladder, blood, brain, breast, cervical, esophageal, intestinal, kidney, lymphatic, lung, prostate, rectum, respiratory tract, skin, testicular, thyroid cancer; leukemia; multiple myeloma; non-Hodgkin's lymphoma
notes: Requires 12 consecutive months of service as a firefighter with the same fire department. Provides mandatory insurance coverage (lump sum + monthly disability benefit) rather than a direct WC presumption. Effective January 1, 2018. Volunteers covered under same statute but with lower benefit levels ($1,500/month vs. 60% of salary).

condition_specific: bladder, blood, brain, breast, cervical, esophageal, intestinal, kidney, lymphatic, lung, prostate, rectum, respiratory tract, skin, testicular, thyroid cancer; leukemia; multiple myeloma; non-Hodgkin's lymphoma
notes: Volunteers explicitly included in the cancer insurance mandate. Monthly disability benefit is $1,500 (vs. 60% of salary for career firefighters). Effective January 1, 2018. Volunteer fire departments not required to cover volunteers who are simultaneously employed as career firefighters at another department.

filing_deadline_notes: Must commence within 24 hours after performing work-related activity
notes: Presumption applies if heart attack, stroke, or vascular rupture: commenced while performing work-related activity, while on duty after such activity, or not later than 24 hours after such activity; AND directly or proximately resulted in death or disability. Rebuttable by competent medical evidence that it was not related to work activity or was caused solely by cardiovascular disease risk factors.

filing_deadline_notes: Must commence within 24 hours after performing work-related activity
notes: Statute covers 'public safety officers' defined to include emergency medical technicians. Presumption applies to heart attack, stroke, or vascular rupture within 24 hours of work-related activity. Rebuttable by competent medical evidence.

filing_deadline_notes: Must commence within 24 hours after performing work-related activity
notes: Statute covers 'public safety officers' defined to include law enforcement officers. Presumption applies to heart attack, stroke, or vascular rupture within 24 hours of work-related activity. Rebuttable by competent medical evidence.

filing_deadline_notes: Must commence within 24 hours after performing work-related activity
notes: Statute covers 'public safety officers' defined to include prison guards. Presumption applies to heart attack, stroke, or vascular rupture within 24 hours of work-related activity. Rebuttable by competent medical evidence.
